source: NV readout/excitation laser (532 nm or near-IR)
direct_line_of_sight_to_10mK: YES (required by design — must be controlled by aperture chain not blocked)
beam_dump_stage: 4 K cold beam dump for stray reflections
risk: Stray NV-readout light heats the sample stage and increases scattered photon floor at NV detector
required_measurement: Optical-power measurement at each cold aperture; sample-stage heating with laser on/off; NV detector noise floor with readout on/off

mode_active: Mode B only (must be blocked during Mode D)
direct_line_of_sight_to_10mK: NO (blocked by closed shutter during Mode D)
risk: fs-laser scatter memory persisting into Mode D after Mode C recovery; window contamination
required_measurement: Shutter-closed leakage test; line-of-sight audit during Mode B-to-D transition; scattered light at sample stage

mode_active: Mode A and Mode D (always present)
aperture_stage: 50 K and 4 K and 1 K cold apertures
risk: Ambient 300 K light entering through the access window and reaching the mK region
required_measurement: Closed-room measurement with shutters open and closed; sample-stage heat load; baffle thermometry

aperture_stage: buffer fiber routing through 4 K and 1 K
risk: Blackbody leakage along uncoated fiber; back-reflected NV light into detection chain
required_measurement: Feedthrough thermometry; sample-stage heating with feedthrough installed vs blanked

aperture_stage: cold filter / spectral filter near collection
risk: Scatter from sample surface or sample mount re-entering the warm side and re-scattering back as background
required_measurement: Background-photon measurement at NV detector with sample illuminated; sample-stage heat load

intercept_stage: full chain: 50 K -> 4 K -> 1 K -> 100 mK -> sample
risk: Aperture misalignment after cooldown contraction; clipping or scatter at apertures themselves
required_measurement: Cold-aligned aperture audit after cooldown; sample-stage heat load with aperture chain in place
